description: Brand contract for the Karna (Adsbranded) cart-based multi-variant (MV) checkout family. Single-package flow: the package is pre-loaded from the funnel step, so the checkout leads with the order (cart-summary) and has NO bundle picker. Private family: source lives in the Adsbranded private template repo.

family_inventory.theme_insertion_point: Load karna-theme.css after css/next-core.css on every page (wired in the base layouts, not per-page frontmatter). It only points next-core's font-family variables at the Karna typeface; css/tokens.css owns the palette.
family_inventory.checkout_shape: CART-BASED, single-package. The checkout LEADS with a 'Your Order' cart-summary (data-next-cart-summary) — the package is pre-loaded from the landing/presell step — followed by customer-info-form + shipping-address-form (inside data-next-component=shipping-form), an optional guarantee, then express-checkout + payment-methods and the submit block. There is NO bundle/package picker on the checkout (no data-next-bundle-selector/-card) — that is the structural distinction from the Arjuna family. Do NOT route a cart-led, no-picker checkout to Arjuna, and do NOT flag the absent bundle selector as a missing requirement.
family_inventory.bundle_picker: NONE — Karna is cart-based. The package is pre-loaded from the funnel step and the checkout leads with the cart-summary; there is no bundle/package picker on the checkout (no data-next-bundle-selector/-card). The only place bundle anchors appear is the single-product OTO, which uses one hidden data-next-bundle-card + a quantity stepper (data-next-upsell-action add/skip) — not a checkout picker.
family_inventory.order_bump: Optional. Not included in the v1 checkout spine; add via the shared bump partials when a CampaignSpec order bump maps.
family_inventory.pricing_presentation: Cart-driven: the order leads with the SDK cart-summary line items + totals (data-next-cart-summary). No bundle-card price shape on checkout. Bundle upsells keep a visible price row above the accept CTA.
family_inventory.upsell_downsell: Single-product one-time offer with a quantity stepper (upsell.html): one hidden bundle card (data-next-bundle-selector/-card) + data-next-upsell-action add/skip, NOT a multi-bundle picker. Requires a visible price row above the accept CTA.
family_inventory.hero_media: No deterministic hero on the cart-based checkout (the order summary leads). The OTO uses an optional swiper gallery (swiper-gallery.html).
family_inventory.typography: Single-font: Inter (--font-primary), with --font-secondary/--font-accent collapsed to --font-primary. Generic debranded default — a built campaign re-skins via its own token layer. NO family names are hardcoded in component CSS; karna-theme.css points next-core's --_text---font-family--* variables at --font-primary.
family_inventory.cro_variance: Karna absorbs CRO revisions as frontmatter-driven OPTIONAL slots, never forks: trust-bar.html (trust_bar.seals / payment_logos), guarantee.html (guarantee.title / body / show:false), rating-stars.html (rating.stars / score / count). MATCHER RULE: classify on the structural strongSignals (cart-summary-led checkout with NO bundle picker + customer-info + shipping-form + express/payment + the .checkout-layout shell), NOT on the presence/absence of any specific badge, seal, rating, or guarantee. Base Karna PLUS CRO badge/seal/rating/guarantee additions is STILL karna.

exit_pop.behavior: Available include only; strip unless CampaignSpec checkout exit_intent or promo_code_input maps an offer/code.

forbidden_computed_colors.token: --brand-primary (Karna starter default; per-campaign brand override missing)
--brand-accent (Karna starter default; per-campaign brand override missing)
